summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Multi-LLM Integration System for BlackieFi. All backend API endpoints and frontend UI components are working correctly. 19/19 backend tests passed, frontend UI fully functional.
critical_code_review_comments: Emergent LLM key is pre-configured in backend/.env - working correctly
All data-testid attributes are properly implemented for testing
Admin access control working correctly on both backend (403 errors) and frontend (Access Denied page)
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_regularuser for non-admin access testing
